rule.name: detecting gamaredon groups cc servers ip addresses and domains proxy
rule.description: This rule detects network connections to compromised IPs and domains related with Gamaredon Group activity (Proxy - domain/IP)  License: https://github.com/Neo23x0/sigma/blob/master/LICENSE.Detection.Rules.md.
rule.query:

    product = "proxy"
